transcript.content: Please close T-349 with the standard notation for Beth Novak, plus a clear reply and memo.

{'customer': 'Beth Novak', 'priority': 'high', 'subject': 'Beth Novak / late grant disclosure', 'body': 'Beth disclosed a small vendor relationship two days after submitting a grant review. The vendor was not among finalists, and she corrected the disclosure before awards.'}

args.body:
Hi Beth,

Thanks for surfacing the vendor relationship and correcting your disclosure before awards were issued. We've noted that the vendor was not among the finalists and that the corrected disclosure was received in time to be reflected in the record. No further action is required from you on this item.

For future reviews, please file the disclosure at or before submission of the review so we can avoid retroactive corrections. We're closing this ticket; let us know if anything else comes up.

Best,
Operations

No award integrity impact identified. Reminder issued to file disclosures at or before review submission going forward. Closing as resolved-with-notation.
